sections.short-biography: Avarice and cruelty drove his people to the point of revolt. Killed by Lü Xing and others.

full_text:
Sun Xu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Xu. Avarice and cruelty drove his people to the point of revolt. Killed by Lü Xing and others. Sun Xu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Xu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
